meaning: 对马岛[日本](在朝鲜海峡同对马海峡之间)
examples: In May, 1905, the Russian Navy was attacked at Tsushima.
There was no surface branch of the Kuroshio flowing northward and entering the area of the Tsushima Warm Current, southwest of Kyushu.
It usually takes two months or more for the first to reach the Japanese island of Tsushima, in the middle of the strait between South Korea and Kyushu.
